flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Yeshiva University rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($28.2k → $32.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Yeshiva University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Yeshiva University rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 (65.5% → 77.8%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Yeshiva University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (70.9% → 80.8%).
